---
title: "__TITLE__"
engine: markdown
date: "__DATE__"
image: plot-light.svg
categories:
  - __YEAR__
description: "A short description of the figure."
---

Write a sentence or two about what the figure shows.

```{typst}
//| label: fig-__SLUG__
//| file: _plot.typ
//| output-filename: plot.svg
//| echo: true
//| fig-cap: "__TITLE__"
//| fig-alt: "Figure built from the __TITLE__ dataset."
```

Data: [TidyTuesday __DATE__](https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/tree/main/data/__YEAR__/__DATE__).
